name: New York Times Lobster Thermidor
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and clean the lobsters. Twist off the claws, reserving the small claws for garnish. Remove meat from the bodies and cut into small pieces. Crack the large claws, remove meat and cube. Reserve the shells.
2. Preheat oven to moderate (350°F).
3. Heat 1/2 cup of the butter in a skillet, add the mushrooms and cook three minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Add the lobster meat, bread crumbs, seasonings, sherry, cognac, heavy cream, and egg yolks to the skillet. Mix well.
5. Fill the lobster shells with the mixture, sprinkle with cheese, dot with the remaining butter and sprinkle with paprika.
6. Place in a shallow pan and bake for fifteen minutes. Serve immediately.
